summary: Excellent soundboard capture of an epic ’78 set, highlighted by a soaring Estimated→Eyes jam and a euphoric Music Never Stopped finish.
review: Reviewers rave about the performance, calling this night one of the best shows of 1978 with a peak‑dead Estimated into Eyes sequence and a transcendent three‑minute ending on Music Never Stopped. The soundboard source is reported clear and free of issues, making the musical brilliance easy to hear.

ai_rating.rationale: Strongly positive comments on both performance (standout jams, flow) and recording quality (soundboard, no complaints). Weighting gives a high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear soundboard source; reviewers note no audio problems or drop‑outs.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Set flows very nicely with a strong middle section; the Estimated→Eyes jam is described as peak Dead and the closing Music Never Stopped delivers pure euphoria.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia’s guitar work praised, especially during Eyes; his “Wolf” tone adds heaviness to the set.
band_member_comments.Phil: Lesh’s bass highlighted during Playing in the Band (P.I.T.B).
